description: A landlord client wants to know if they should increase the asking rent for a vacant office suite. The agent must analyze current market rates.

nodes.task_description: Identify the property's submarket and class.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly categorizes the subject property.

nodes.task_description: Search commercial real estate databases for recent lease comparables in the same submarket and class.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds at least 5 comparable lease transactions from the last 6 months.

nodes.task_description: Generate a lease comparable report and advise the client on a competitive asking price based on the data.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a report and provides a data-backed recommendation.
